items.name: ° Lightweight Lapraia Vintage Hoop Earrings
items.description: Like a well-timed flirtation or an impromptu flight to Paris, the Lightweight Lapraia Vintage Hoop Earrings are equal parts bold and adaptable. Whether you're queued up for your favorite cookies or crossing the cosmos, these little halos keep your lobes feeling luxe. Hand-welded by Lilee, kissed with 24k magic—because your ears deserve the best.
